# Copilot Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. Done: recreated after scaffold.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements. Done: requirements confirmed with user.
- [x] Scaffold the Project. Done: Next.js App Router scaffolded.
- [x] Customize the Project. Done: created voter/admin flows, Supabase schema, and UI.
 - [~] Customize the Project. Partially done: core voter/admin flows, Supabase schema, and UI implemented. Remaining UX items: candidate add/edit modal (UI present; review) and admin approvals history tab (implemented). Completed recent UX: single-centered photo capture UI and post-vote confirmation modal implemented.
- [x] Install Required Extensions. Done: no extensions required.
- [x] Compile the Project. Done: production build passes.
- [x] Create and Run Task. Done: added workspace tasks for dev and build.
- [x] Launch the Project. Done: development server is running for website review.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete. Done: README updated and instructions cleaned.
 - [~] Launch the Project. Partially done: development server runs locally; production deployment checklist (hosting, env, domain) not completed.
 - [~] Ensure Documentation is Complete. Partially done: README and basic instructions present. Remaining docs: developer TODOs, release/deploy steps, and UX change log for pending items.

Work through each checklist item systematically.
Keep communication concise and focused.
Follow development best practices.
